expectations.evidence: No UI testing gap in report

notes: Found same 6 issues as with-skill
Wrote fewer tests (~10 vs 45+)
Also correctly skipped UI testing
All assertions pass 100% in both configurations -- assertions need to be more discriminating
Real value is in DEPTH: with-skill consistently finds more issues (16 vs 14, 7 vs 5, 6 vs 6) and writes more tests (54 vs 38, 39 vs 26, 45 vs 10)
Biggest differentiator: Eval 2 (FastAPI) -- with-skill wrote 13 template-specific tests with XSS verification; baseline did minimal template testing
Eval 3 (backend-only) shows both correctly skip UI testing -- good negative case baseline
With-skill has more consistent timing (stddev 56s vs 117s) suggesting structured workflow reduces variance
Baseline sometimes takes longer (TS: 490s vs 398s) despite doing less -- unstructured exploration wastes time
